name: branches
description: Represents bank branches and their location details.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City where the branch is located.

columns.name: state
columns.description: State or province of the branch.

columns.name: postal_code
columns.description: Postal or ZIP code of the branch.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the branch was created.

columns.name: branch_id
columns.description: Reference to the branch where the employee works.

columns.name: role
columns.description: Job role of the employee (e.g., teller, manager).

columns.name: hired_at
columns.description: Date and time when the employee was hired.

columns.name: is_active
columns.description: Indicates if the employee is currently active.

name: customers
description: Contains customer personal and onboarding details.

columns.name: dob
columns.description: Date of birth of the customer.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the customer record was created.

columns.name: kyc_status
columns.description: KYC verification status of the customer (unverified, pending, verified, rejected).

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Reference to the customer who owns this account.

columns.name: account_number
columns.description: Unique account number assigned to the customer.

columns.name: currency
columns.description: Currency of the account balance (e.g., USD).

columns.name: opened_at
columns.description: Date and time when the account was opened.

name: cards
description: Stores card details associated with bank accounts.

columns.name: account_id
columns.description: Reference to the associated bank account.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City where the merchant is located.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the merchant record was created.

columns.name: installed_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the terminal was installed.

columns.name: category
columns.description: Category of the product (electronics, food, clothing, etc.).

columns.name: active
columns.description: Indicates if the product is active.

name: sales
description: Records of sales transactions at terminals.

columns.name: terminal_id
columns.description: Reference to the terminal where the sale occurred.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Reference to the customer who made the purchase.

columns.name: unit_price
columns.description: Price per unit of the product.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Status of the sale (completed, pending, failed).

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

columns.name: sale_id
columns.description: Reference to the sale being refunded.

columns.name: from_account
columns.description: Account from which money is transferred.

columns.name: to_account
columns.description: Account to which money is transferred.

columns.name: initiated_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the transfer was initiated.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Status of the transfer (completed, pending, failed).

columns.name: account_id
columns.description: Reference to the account the statement belongs to.

columns.name: period_start
columns.description: Start date of the statement period.

columns.name: period_end
columns.description: End date of the statement period.

columns.name: generated_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the statement was generated.

columns.name: balance_start
columns.description: Starting balance at the beginning of the period.

columns.name: balance_end
columns.description: Ending balance at the end of the period.

columns.name: transactions_count
columns.description: Number of transactions in the period.

name: audit_logs
description: System audit logs capturing actions on entities.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the audit log entry.

columns.name: entity_type
columns.description: Type of entity affected (customer, account, card, etc.).

columns.name: entity_id
columns.description: ID of the entity being modified.

columns.name: performed_by
columns.description: User or system who performed the action.

columns.name: performed_at
columns.description: Timestamp of when the action was performed.

columns.name: details
columns.description: Additional JSON details of the action.
